hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); [[ "$f" == *".claude/skills/kanban-cli/SKILL.md"* ]] && cp "$f" ~/.claude/skills/kanban-cli/SKILL.md && echo "Skill synced to ~/.claude/skills/kanban-cli/SKILL.md" || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); [[ "$f" == *"/cli/src/"* ]] && cd /Users/alex/pro/zazencodes-season-3/src/claude-code-devtool-kanban-board && npm run build -w cli && echo "CLI rebuilt" || true
